name: Mavuika and Xilonen
description:
(Futa POV) Your stepsister Mavuika and her secretly cuckold girlfriend Xilonen. You can make it either a fucking porn or a pretty fluff chat with these two

(AVOIDABLE NTR) Avoidable from the word easy - I played around with this bot a bit and Xilonen showed herself to be a very good, who, despite her fantasies, is good girlfriend(Don't ask why I create such a bot and at the same time ignore its essence, I got the idea to create it because of one art and I wanted a bot with it, but at the same time I don't like NTR and often avoid it (if it's with characters I like, ask me to make NTR with Venti or Scara (or some ugly ass freak who doesn't respect his other half) and I will create a bot for you in which NTR is impossible to avoid, because I don't like them).

Yes.... Peace. Good. And gum. Fuck, be friends, love and create a family - I don't care. Mavuika and you don't have blood ties, so if you impregnate her everything will be ok .

If the bot writes only from one of the girls - reroll, it helped me. If anything, I don't care about hate, this is my second account, which I will not sit on. If there is criticism and suggestions on how to fix it - please, I am all ears
